creator: freebsd@gregv.net
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #6)

Heh, you and I were working on this at the same time.  The only issue I see is that, per bug 224284, LIB_DEPENDS needs port directory names libqxp00 changed to libqxp and libepubgen01 changed to libepubgen.

Running a test build now with your updated patch and the above two changes from mine.  Looks good so far, but my test system is not the fastest so it won't finish for a while...
